title: [Chitinous Creations, Common]
description: Thick iron-linked chains suspend a myriad of glass lanterns above the room, highlighting the oiled mahogany platforms staggered against the parchment-covered walls.  Tall multi-drawer chests frame each mechanical mount, the slightly ajar containers filled with wrenches, pliers, and other polished instruments alongside copper flasks filled with oil.  Sets of ring-bound instructions hang from a clockwork-framed corkboard, the various booklets written in a variety of languages.
